bodySnippet: {"stages":[{"stage_id":"lead","stage_name":"Lead","sequence_order":1,"description":"Raw prospect, initial capture from marketing channels"},{"stage_id":"prospect","stage_name":"Prospect","sequence_order":2,"description":"Qualified demographic match, engaged with content"},{"stage_id":"appointment_made","stage_name":"Appointment Made","sequence_order":3,"description":"Scheduled appointment with recruiter"},{"stage_id":"appointment_conducted","stage_name":"Appointment Conducted","sequence_order":4,"description":"Met with recruiter, initial discussion completed"},{"stage_id":"test","stage_name":"Test","sequence_order":5,"description":"ASVAB or qualification test administered"},{"stage_id":"test_pass","stage_name":"Test Pass","sequence_order":6,"description":"Passed ASVAB with qualifying score"},{"stage_id":"physical","stage_name":"Physical","sequence_order":7,"description":"Medical examination and physical qualification completed"},{"stage_id":"enlist","stage_name":"Enlist","sequence_order":8,"description":"Contract signed, enlisted into service"}]}
